raw_consumer_statement: I ordered an item that was never delivered by XXXX  to my home. Instead it was delivered to another home, which is evidenced by the signature provided on the proof of delivery. I have explained this over and over to Macys and to no avail, Im still being charged {$250.00} for XXXX XXXX that I have never received. Myself and my husband both work at XXXX XXXX and were not home at the time of the supposed deliver, we also have a XXXX camera, which shows no one delivered anything to our home. I also reached out to the vendor that delivered the package several times through the Macys app and through email. Still no response. Highly disappointed in Macys and how they treat their customers. Its highway robbery to hardworking people.
